Headline: #71 71st/South Shore Temporary Northbound Reroute near 73rd/Exchange
ShortDescription: Northbound  71 71st/South Shore buses are temporarily rerouted via 75th, Exchange and 71st: due to, street blockage near 73rd/Exchange.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Northbound  #71 71st/South Shore buses are temporarily rerouted via 75th, Exchange and 71st: due to, street blockage near 73rd/Exchange.

Southbound  buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
